case_title: CLINTON SOCKWELL II VS. ALFREDO E. CONTRERAS et al

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-24-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED OCT-08-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, ALFREDO E.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $30.00) SERVED OCT-08-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LUMBI, AIDA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SOCKWELL II, CLINTON AS TO DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, ALFREDO E. LUMBI, AIDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOCKWELL II, CLINTON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONTRERAS, ALFREDO E. LUMBI, AIDA $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,590.00, DEFENDANT MAY SATISFY JUDGMENT BY PROVIDING PLAINTIFF WILL ALL NECESSARY DOCUMENTS TO COMPLETE TRANSFER OF TITLE, DULY EXECUTED BY THE APPROPRIATE PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
